basic_details.job_title: IIT Gandhinagar Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for Junior Research Fellow and Research Associ Posts
basic_details.post_name: Junior Research Fellow (JRF) and Research Associate-I (RA-I)
basic_details.short_information: Indian Institute of Technology Gandhinagar (IIT Gandhinagar) Junior Research Fellow (JRF) and Research Associate-I (RA-I) Notification 2026 has been released on 09 July 2026 on the official website iitgn.ac.in. A total of 2 vacancies have been announced through the IIT Gandhinagar Junior Research Fellow (JRF) and Research Associate-I (RA-I) Recruitment 2026.

qualification.education_qualification: B.Tech/M.Tech/M.Sc, Ph.D, CSIR-UGC NET/GATE or equivalent, Experience in molecular biology techniques
qualification.details: Junior Research Fellow (JRF): B.Tech/M.Tech/M.Sc in Chemical Engineering, Biotechnology, Chemistry or Materials Engineering or other allied areas. Qualified in CSIR-UGC NET/GATE or equivalent national-level examination. Demonstrated experience with molecular biology techniques such DNA/RNA isolation, Primer design, Mutagenesis PCR, Restriction digest, Gibson assembly, Gel electrophoresis, Design and construction of recombinant vectors, Transformations of vectors, Protein Expression and Purification. Research Associate-I (RA-I): Ph.D in Chemical Engineering, Chemistry or Materials Engineering or other allied areas. Candidates who have submitted their thesis are equally eligible for these positions. Demonstrated experience with molecular biology techniques such DNA/RNA isolation, Primer design, Mutagenesis PCR, Restriction digest, Gibson assembly, Gel electrophoresis, Design and construction of recombinant vectors, Transformations of vectors, Protein Expression and Purification. Desirable: Directed Evolution techniques.

salary_details.details: Junior Research Fellow (JRF): Rs.45,880/- Per Month Research Associate-I (RA-I): Rs.71,290/- Per Month

how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 20-07-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of IIT Gandhinagar to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

_labels.notification_pdf: Download IIT Gandhinagar Job 2026 Notification PDF

rows.indian_institute_of_technology_gandhinag: Junior Research Fellow (JRF) and Research Associate-I (RA-I)
B.Tech/M.Tech/M.Sc, Ph.D, CSIR-UGC NET/GATE or equivalent, Experience in molecular biology techniques

content_sections.heading: IIT Gandhinagar Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the IIT Gandhinagar Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download IIT Gandhinagar Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: IIT Gandhinagar Recruitment 2026 - Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Junior Research Fellow (JRF): B.Tech/M.Tech/M.Sc in Chemical Engineering, Biotechnology, Chemistry or Materials Engineering or other allied areas. Qualified in CSIR-UGC NET/GATE or equivalent national-level examination. Demonstrated experience with molecular biology techniques such DNA/RNA isolation, Primer design, Mutagenesis PCR, Restriction digest, Gibson assembly, Gel electrophoresis, Design and construction of recombinant vectors, Transformations of vectors, Protein Expression and Purification. Research Associate-I (RA-I): Ph.D in Chemical Engineering, Chemistry or Materials Engineering or other allied areas. Candidates who have submitted their thesis are equally eligible for these positions. Demonstrated experience with molecular biology techniques such DNA/RNA isolation, Primer design, Mutagenesis PCR, Restriction digest, Gibson assembly, Gel electrophoresis, Design and construction of recombinant vectors, Transformations of vectors, Protein Expression and Purification. Desirable: Directed Evolution techniques.

content_sections.heading: IIT Gandhinagar Recruitment 2026 - Salary / Stipend
content_sections.text: Junior Research Fellow (JRF): Rs.45,880/- Per Month Research Associate-I (RA-I): Rs.71,290/- Per Month

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Applications must be submitted online on or before 20-07-2026. To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section. Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of IIT Gandhinagar to complete the application. Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details. Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format. Pay the application fee online, if applicable. Review all details carefully before submitting the form. Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the IIT Gandhinagar recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application form for the Junior Research Fellow (JRF) and Research Associate-I (RA-I) posts is 20th July 2026.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available in this recruitment?
faq.answer: There are a total of 2 vacancies announced for the Junior Research Fellow (JRF) and Research Associate-I (RA-I) positions at IIT Gandhinagar.

faq.question: Q3. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: Candidates can apply online for this recruitment through the official website of IIT Gandhinagar.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Junior Research Fellow (JRF) post?
faq.answer: The salary offered for the Junior Research Fellow (JRF) post is Rs. 45,880/- per month.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Research Associate-I (RA-I) post?
faq.answer: The salary offered for the Research Associate-I (RA-I) post is Rs. 71,290/- per month.

faq.question: Q6. What are the minimum educational qualifications required for the JRF position?
faq.answer: For the JRF position, candidates need a B.Tech/M.Tech/M.Sc in relevant fields and must have qualified in CSIR-UGC NET/GATE or an equivalent national-level examination.

faq.question: Q7. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) in the official notification.

faq.question: Q8. What kind of experience is required for these positions?
faq.answer: Both positions require demonstrated experience in molecular biology techniques, including DNA/RNA isolation, primer design, PCR, and protein expression and purification.

faq.question: Q9. Where can I find the official notification PDF?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be accessed through the 'Important Links' section of this article, labeled as 'Official Notification PDF'.

faq.question: Q10. What is the job type for these positions?
faq.answer: The job type for these positions at IIT Gandhinagar is contractual.
